title: carex occultans
intro: Carex occultans, also known as the hidden sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). Traditionally, Carex occultans has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and as an anti-inflammatory agent. The plant's health benefits include its ability to soothe gastrointestinal problems, reduce inflammation, and aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Carex occultans can be prepared as an herbal tea by infusing the dried leaves and roots in hot water, or by making a tincture by steeping the plant in a solvent such as ethanol.
